title: Good Morning Aakash
desc: The host invites various artistes and musicians and engages in conversation with them. The artistes perform traditional folk songs as well as provide insights into the world of music.

title: Adi Shakti Adyapeeth
desc: Annadacharan Bhattacharya had a divine vision and found an idol in Kolkata. This miracle made him famous and people called him Annada Thakur from then on.

title: Khonar Kahini
desc: Khona's tale blends mythology and history, following the legendary astrologer-poet who challenged societal norms with wisdom and wit in medieval Bengal's patriarchal culture.

title: Swet Patharer Thala
desc: Love, tradition, and societal struggles play out in a compelling story filled with heartfelt emotions and challenges.

title: Akashe Superstar
desc: Join in for Akashe Superstar, where talented singers perform to win hearts. Tune in to witness captivating and impressive performances.

title: Police Filez
desc: This show shares real cases of crime, like harassment and kidnapping. Watch dramatic re-enactments of the cases. A host guides you through each gripping story.

title: Bolidan
desc: When Jayantha's brother commits crimes, he takes on the blame and gets arrested. This takes a toll on his happy life with Usha.

title: Balidan
desc: Inspector Vijay makes an enemy with bandit Ranga. When a vengeful Ranga abducts his wife and daughter, Vijay must race against time to save his family.
